## Anything specific you're trying to do?

---

*Claude is our default in the simulator, but the Geotab MCP connector is
client-agnostic. We're publishing setup guides for more clients over time — this
issue helps us prioritize. Please **do not** include any credentials, tokens, or
personal/fleet data in this issue.*
